description_long: This rifle features a compact, utilitarian design with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden grip panels and a folding wire stock. The magazine is a straight, detachable box type, positioned vertically beneath the receiver. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, including a front post and a rear aperture, for basic aiming. The folding stock is made of metal rods, designed for portability and ease of storage, and the trigger guard is prominent beneath the receiver. The overall finish is matte with some glossy highlights on the metal surfaces, and the wood grip adds a touch of classic styling. The muzzle is plain, with no visible suppressor or flash hider attached.
description: A compact black rifle with a wooden grip, folding wire stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is utilitarian with a matte metal finish and classic wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular front sight and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the wooden grip, folding wire stock, straight magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear aperture sight and the alignment of the folding stock.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the trigger, magazine, and the full length of the folding stock and barrel.
